CustomField.description: When true, this work order blocks stage advancement on the related IndividualApplication. The NEPA_Stage_Gate flow checks for any open work order with nepa_hard_gate__c = true before allowing process stage transition. Set to true by NEPA_Plaintiff_Intelligence for tribal consultation work orders and by NEPA_CE_Screener for extraordinary-circumstances work orders.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This work order is a hard gate. The process cannot advance to the next stage until this work order is closed.
CustomField.label: Hard Gate
